title: Trust Architecture
promise: How do you build, verify, and lose trust? A blueprint of five trust mechanisms — relational, contractual, reputational, procedural, and communal.
description: 10 original scenarios. Each offers one option per trust mechanism. Result maps your primary and secondary mechanisms with where they fit and where they leak, with a partnership-comparison insight.
ogDescription: How do you build trust? 10 scenarios, ~3 min. Private by design.
